question: Average website sign-ups per year are shown in the chart. Which of the following statements is most appropriate?

options.A: The latest year shows a sharp decline in sign-ups compared to previous years.
options.B: From this chart we cannot draw firm conclusions about the latest year’s overall performance.
options.C: Sign-ups have been steadily increasing every year.
options.D: The latest year has the highest sign-ups of the entire period.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 4 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (455 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,396 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
